revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook (identifier)|Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2013|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Facebook ID|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}

[https://www.facebook.com/{{Trim|{{{1|people/{{{id}}}}}}}} {{{2|{{{name|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}}}}] on [[Facebook]]<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Please add categories to the /doc subpage & add interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

[https://www.facebook.com/{{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|{{#property:P2013|[[Category:Facebook template with no id set]]}}}}}}}}}} {{{2|{{{name|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}}}}] on [[Facebook]]<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Please add categories to the /doc subpage & add interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

{{subst:https}}{{#if:{{#property:P2013}} |[https://www.facebook.com/{{Trim|{{#property:P2013}}}} {{#if:|{{{name}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}] on [[Facebook]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|}} |{{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID]]}} }}{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{id|}}}{{#property:P2013}} |[https://www.facebook.com/{{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|{{#property:P2013}}}}}}}}}} {{#if:{{{2|{{{name|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{name}}}}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}] on [[Facebook]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}} |{{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID]]}} }} {{Documentation}} ==E.O. No. 335==

Republic off the Philippines

[[••☙◄]] Central Classified Institutional Archived [[►❧••]]

• [[Complete Official Text]] • [[Annotated Copy]] • [[Editorial]] • [[Experimental]]  [[Fictional]] 

Kalatasa'ng Kodigo-Pasakamalayang Pamanalastasan

{{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}

{{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2013|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Facebook ID|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}

{{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2013|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Facebook ID|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}

{{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook (identifier)|Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2013|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Facebook ID|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Seems to sound better with ''on''; also consistent with {{tl|Twitter}} that way.
Nominated for deletion; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion#Template:Facebook]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
revert addition of logo: I don't think there is consensus for that change.
[[Help:Reverting|Reverted]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/UnitedStatesian|UnitedStatesian]] ([[User talk:UnitedStatesian|talk]]) to last version by Ssr
link to protocol relative URL; has been live for some time without making any problems
Remove any leading spaces from unnamed first parameter that might break URL.
revision.text: [https://www.facebook.com/{{Trim|{{{1|people/{{{id}}}}}}}} {{{2|{{{name|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}}}}] on [[Facebook]]<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Please add categories to the /doc subpage & add interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Set to track Wikidata [[d:Property:P2013|P2013]] (adding [[Category:Facebook template with no id set]]); removed "people/" from URL, which no longer works
revision.text: [https://www.facebook.com/{{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|{{#property:P2013|[[Category:Facebook template with no id set]]}}}}}}}}}} {{{2|{{{name|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}}}}] on [[Facebook]]<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Please add categories to the /doc subpage & add interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Update handling of missing ID (previous placement of category prevented it from being included).
use [[Module:EditAtWikidata]] to add edit link if using Wikidata

revision.text:
{{subst:https}}{{#if:{{#property:P2013}} |[https://www.facebook.com/{{Trim|{{#property:P2013}}}} {{#if:|{{{name}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}] on [[Facebook]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|}} |{{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID]]}} }}{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{id|}}}{{#property:P2013}} |[https://www.facebook.com/{{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|{{#property:P2013}}}}}}}}}} {{#if:{{{2|{{{name|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{name}}}}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}] on [[Facebook]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}} |{{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID]]}} }} {{Documentation}} ==E.O. No. 335==

Republic off the Philippines
[[•••☙◄]] KodigoLogo BiblioLex ScriptOrivm Terminvs® [[►❧•••]]
[[••☙◄]] Central Classified Institutional Archived [[►❧••]]
[[•☙◄]] Head Office of the Librarian General [[►❧•]]

• [[Complete Official Text]] • [[Annotated Copy]] • [[Editorial]] • [[Experimental]]  [[Fictional]] 

Kalatasa'ng Kodigo-Pasakamalayang Pamanalastasan

revision.comment: add "link" parameter same as used in [[Template:Facebook Page]]
If Wikidata property has multiple values, only use first one. Remove {{Trim|}} since {{#if:}} does same.

revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}

{{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2013|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Facebook ID|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Update so testing for [[:Category:Facebook ID different from Wikidata]] ignores upper/lower case differences between ID in template and ID in Wikidata. Tested first in [[/sandbox]].
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2013|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Facebook ID|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: use identifier link similar to IMDb templates
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook (identifier)|Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2013|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Facebook ID|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Seems to sound better with ''on''; also consistent with {{tl|Twitter}} that way.
Nominated for deletion; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion#Template:Facebook]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
link to protocol relative URL; has been live for some time without making any problems
rv. per [[Template talk:Twitter#Protocol-relative URL]], there's no reason for not simply using HTTPS in all cases
Remove any leading spaces from unnamed first parameter that might break URL.
revision.text: [https://www.facebook.com/{{Trim|{{{1|people/{{{id}}}}}}}} {{{2|{{{name|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}}}}] on [[Facebook]]<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Please add categories to the /doc subpage & add interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Set to track Wikidata [[d:Property:P2013|P2013]] (adding [[Category:Facebook template with no id set]]); removed "people/" from URL, which no longer works
revision.text: [https://www.facebook.com/{{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|{{#property:P2013|[[Category:Facebook template with no id set]]}}}}}}}}}} {{{2|{{{name|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}}}}] on [[Facebook]]<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Please add categories to the /doc subpage & add interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Update handling of missing ID (previous placement of category prevented it from being included).
use [[Module:EditAtWikidata]] to add edit link if using Wikidata

revision.text:
{{subst:https}}{{#if:{{#property:P2013}} |[https://www.facebook.com/{{Trim|{{#property:P2013}}}} {{#if:|{{{name}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}] on [[Facebook]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|}} |{{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID]]}} }}{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{id|}}}{{#property:P2013}} |[https://www.facebook.com/{{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|{{#property:P2013}}}}}}}}}} {{#if:{{{2|{{{name|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{name}}}}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}] on [[Facebook]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}} |{{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID]]}} }} {{Documentation}} ==E.O. No. 335==

Kalatasa'ng Kodigo-Pasakamalayang Pamanalastasan

revision.comment: add "link" parameter same as used in [[Template:Facebook Page]]
If Wikidata property has multiple values, only use first one. Remove {{Trim|}} since {{#if:}} does same.

revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}

{{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2013|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Facebook ID|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2013|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Facebook ID|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: use identifier link similar to IMDb templates
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook (identifier)|Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2013|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Facebook ID|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Seems to sound better with ''on''; also consistent with {{tl|Twitter}} that way.
Nominated for deletion; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion#Template:Facebook]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/212.159.45.2|212.159.45.2]] ([[User talk:212.159.45.2|talk]]) editing [[WP:Sandbox|tests]] or vandalism ([[WP:HG|HG]])
revert addition of logo: I don't think there is consensus for that change.
[[Help:Reverting|Reverted]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/UnitedStatesian|UnitedStatesian]] ([[User talk:UnitedStatesian|talk]]) to last version by Ssr
link to protocol relative URL; has been live for some time without making any problems
Remove any leading spaces from unnamed first parameter that might break URL.
revision.text: [https://www.facebook.com/{{Trim|{{{1|people/{{{id}}}}}}}} {{{2|{{{name|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}}}}] on [[Facebook]]<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Please add categories to the /doc subpage & add interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Update handling of missing ID (previous placement of category prevented it from being included).
use [[Module:EditAtWikidata]] to add edit link if using Wikidata

If Wikidata property has multiple values, only use first one. Remove {{Trim|}} since {{#if:}} does same.

revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}

{{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2013|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Facebook ID|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Update so testing for [[:Category:Facebook ID different from Wikidata]] ignores upper/lower case differences between ID in template and ID in Wikidata. Tested first in [[/sandbox]].
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2013|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Facebook ID|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: use identifier link similar to IMDb templates
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook (identifier)|Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2013|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Facebook ID|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Seems to sound better with ''on''; also consistent with {{tl|Twitter}} that way.
Nominated for deletion; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion#Template:Facebook]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/212.159.45.2|212.159.45.2]] ([[User talk:212.159.45.2|talk]]) editing [[WP:Sandbox|tests]] or vandalism ([[WP:HG|HG]])
revert addition of logo: I don't think there is consensus for that change.
[[Help:Reverting|Reverted]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/UnitedStatesian|UnitedStatesian]] ([[User talk:UnitedStatesian|talk]]) to last version by Ssr
link to protocol relative URL; has been live for some time without making any problems
rv. per [[Template talk:Twitter#Protocol-relative URL]], there's no reason for not simply using HTTPS in all cases
Remove any leading spaces from unnamed first parameter that might break URL.
revision.text: [https://www.facebook.com/{{Trim|{{{1|people/{{{id}}}}}}}} {{{2|{{{name|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}}}}] on [[Facebook]]<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Please add categories to the /doc subpage & add interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Set to track Wikidata [[d:Property:P2013|P2013]] (adding [[Category:Facebook template with no id set]]); removed "people/" from URL, which no longer works
revision.text: [https://www.facebook.com/{{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|{{#property:P2013|[[Category:Facebook template with no id set]]}}}}}}}}}} {{{2|{{{name|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}}}}] on [[Facebook]]<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Please add categories to the /doc subpage & add interwikis to Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Update handling of missing ID (previous placement of category prevented it from being included).
use [[Module:EditAtWikidata]] to add edit link if using Wikidata

revision.text:
{{subst:https}}{{#if:{{#property:P2013}} |[https://www.facebook.com/{{Trim|{{#property:P2013}}}} {{#if:|{{{name}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}] on [[Facebook]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|}} |{{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID]]}} }}{{#if:{{{1|}}}{{{id|}}}{{#property:P2013}} |[https://www.facebook.com/{{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|{{#property:P2013}}}}}}}}}} {{#if:{{{2|{{{name|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{name}}}}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}] on [[Facebook]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}} |{{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID]]}} }} {{Documentation}} ==E.O. No. 335==

Republic off the Philippines
[[•••☙◄]] KodigoLogo BiblioLex ScriptOrivm Terminvs® [[►❧•••]]
[[••☙◄]] Central Classified Institutional Archived [[►❧••]]
[[•☙◄]] Head Office of the Librarian General [[►❧•]]

• [[Complete Official Text]] • [[Annotated Copy]] • [[Editorial]] • [[Experimental]]  [[Fictional]] 

Kalatasa'ng Kodigo-Pasakamalayang Pamanalastasan

revision.comment: add "link" parameter same as used in [[Template:Facebook Page]]
If Wikidata property has multiple values, only use first one. Remove {{Trim|}} since {{#if:}} does same.

revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}

{{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2013|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Facebook ID|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: add "link" parameter same as used in [[Template:Facebook Page]]
If Wikidata property has multiple values, only use first one. Remove {{Trim|}} since {{#if:}} does same.

revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook (identifier)|Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2013|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Facebook ID|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook (identifier)|Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2013|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Facebook ID|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook (identifier)|Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2013|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Facebook ID|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]] [[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2013}} | [https://www.facebook.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2013}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on {{#ifeq:{{{link}}}|no|Facebook|[[Facebook (identifier)|Facebook]]}}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2013|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2013|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Facebook ID|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Facebook|Facebook]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Facebook]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | link | name }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Facebook template missing ID and not in Wikidata]] [[Category:Pages using Facebook with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Facebook here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
